ground_truth.title: Joco Cup 4oz
ground_truth.main_content:
The 4oz reusable Joco cup is meticulously hand-crafted from borosilicate glass and medical grade silicone. Certified non-toxic, antibacterial, 100% plastic-free and designed for a lifetime of use. Make the smart choice for your hot beverages and the planet.

XS - 118ml
Made for Espresso, Macchiato, Piccolo, Tea

Designed for a lifetime of use - the smartest choice for people and planet.

Features

Specialty: Espresso, Macchiato, Piccolo, Tea
Anti splash, ergonomic design
Nose Dome, room for the nose, head-tilt-free drinking
Thermal silicone sleeve
Architecture for the perfect pour
Use with and without the lid
Artisan blown
Thermal shock and etch resistant
Non-porous and antibacterial
Stain and odour resistant
100% plastic-free
Certified and truly non-toxic | LFGB approved | Bisophenol (BPA, BPF, BPS, EA) free

Materials & Dimensions

Precisely formulated, artisan blown borosilicate glass
Precisely formulated, premium grade silicone
100% plastic-free
Certified and truly non-toxic | LFGB approved | Bisophenol (BPA, BPF, BPS, EA) free

Dimensions
4oz / 118ml / X Small
Waist width 65mm
Base Width 47mm
Height (without Lid) 69mm
Overall height (with lid) 86mm

Artisan

Made by artists NOT machines. The Joco studio brings together a collective of master artisans. Using their carefully honed skill sets to deliver meticulously crafted designs with unwavering quality and personal touch. Each and every product has been treated as an individual art piece and is made just for you.

Your Impact

Every Joco purchase serves as a lifetime solution eliminating plastic and single-use waste, with the added means to retrieve and repurpose toxic plastic debris 24/7.

Components

Artisan blown glass
Artisan Blown – Made by artists NOT machines. Crafted from high-grade borosilicate glass, equipped with wide-mouth design and steady flow function. Etch and thermal shock resistant, lightweight and durable, with optimal clarity.

Anti-splash ergonomic design
The Joco classic lid has been engineered for an anti splash experience, allowing you to drink your beverage NOT wear it. The ergonomic nose dome ensures nose-to-lid collisions are eliminated and allow for head-tilt free drinking.

Thermal silicone sleeve
The thermal silicone sleeve provides grip and protection, whilst keeping your brew at the optimum drinking temperature. Precisely formulated, non-porous and antibacterial, Joco silicone is easy to clean, stain and odour resistant, oven and microwave safe.
with: meticulously hand-crafted from borosilicate glass and medical grade silicone
